Event: Summer Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: CB38
Sharp Spike Crossbow

When attacking, has a [32%-34%] chance of dealing [155%-165%] damage in 2 seconds.
Once in a while the crossbow wielder shoots bolts at 3 random enemy units. The bolts deal 148000 pure damage. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. They also silence the targets. The enemy units can't use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 3 sec. If an enemy unit dies within 3 of being hit by a bolt, they can't be revived for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Event: Summer Festival 2025

Event date: 01/06/2025

Sage bot code: CB38

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
